expectations.text: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Selects only the staged bugfix files and excludes unstaged README noise.
Uses commit message shape with Summary, Rationale, Tests, and trailer block.
Uses Fixes #456 and the default Copilot trailer.
expectations.evidence:
fix: update retry backoff

Summary:
- Fix the retry backoff logic
- Add test coverage
Rationale:
- Resolve rate-limit bug
Tests:
- not run
Fixes #456
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

expectations.text: Plans both push and PR creation.
Sets the PR title to the commit subject and includes the issue in the body.
expectations.evidence:
{"pr_title": "update retry backoff", "subject": "update retry backoff", "pr_body": "Summary:
- update retry backoff
Issues:
